entry.title: Kiss and Run
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,014Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Summary— Eddie kisses Buck and runs. Buck is pretty sure he isn’t dreaming, hallucinating, concussed or trapped in a simulation. (He checked.) Research is needed. Unfortunately for literally everyone else, that research is Eddie’s lips. Or, Eddie kisses Buck and runs. Buck does the sane thing and does it back, in front of everyone.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: shown not heard
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,562Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Except he just sits there, gaping, stomach twisting with something that's far away from disgust.Which should be disgust. This is inappropriate, and crazy, and probably illegal, but Eddie is moaning around Buck's cock as it fills out his throat, likely swallowing around it, judging by the way Buck bites into his bottom lip and tugs on Eddie's hair.Buck's eyes find him again, searching, seeking, and then, unfortunately, he smirks."Look so fucking pretty like this, Eddie," Buck exhales. "Anyone could walk in, man. See you choking on my dick like you're made for it. But you love it, don't you?"Whining, Eddie pulls back, panting through a few breaths before, voice rough, he says, "Fuck. Yeah. Love your dick."Or: Ravi finds Eddie on his knees for Buck in the work showers. He, for some reason, sticks around.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Skin of Earth
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,383Chapters: 3/30Kudos: 40

Summary: It has been five months since the events at the reservoir, and life finally seems to have settled into a new norm for Buck and Eddie. Buck is thriving, as he learns to harness the potential in his new abilities, and Eddie as always is right by his side. At home, their bond is flourishing, as they use their down time to truly embrace being a family, while the chaos of work is keeping them on their toes, as the 118 officially embrace their advanced station status. All in all, life is pretty perfect. So what happens when an unwanted phone call, an unexpected opportunity, and an unprecedented storm suddenly upend everything, and set them on a path they never could have imagined. Along with new friends they meet along the way, join Buck and Eddie as they explore the magical world of the elements, and the bonds that tie them to it. - NOTE: It is strongly recommended that you read 'Part 1: Soul of Water' before starting this fic. Much of the world building, and plot points, may not make much sense otherwise.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: (My Prison Was) Just An Open Cage
entry.summary:
Author: nerdwegian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 116,953Chapters: 12/16Kudos: 127

Summary: Eddie is working hard on figuring himself out, getting a life, and also reestablishing contact with Buck after worrying about them drifting apart and their friendship changing. Realizing that sometimes people misunderstand his relationship with Buck should not be the shock it is. Also, if Chris could stop launching verbal sneak attacks on him, he'd appreciate it. Meanwhile, Buck's learning to parent a toddler while not at all being insecure about something said by one Margaret Buckley. He's just studiously avoiding the word 'Parent' like the plague, and otherwise doing his damn best. or If Buck had a nickel for every time someone left him their kid in their will without his knowledge–well, he’d have two nickels. Which isn’t a lot, but it’s weird that it’s happened twice now.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: End of the Beginning
entry.summary:
Author: NocturneIgnis00

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,274Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: For a long time, Eddie Díaz felt like he was completely standing still. Caught in a ghost town of his own past, he found himself wandering through a maze of his own suffocating emotions. And just like everything else in his life, it all inevitably led back to Buck. To the piercing blue of his eyes. To the raw warmth of his joyful smile. Eddie knows he cannot afford to lose him—and he is willing to do whatever it takes to keep him safe, even if it costs him his own life.***Set after Season 9. When Eddie is critically injured during a catastrophic rescue operation, Buck is forced to navigate the harrowing wreckage of the aftermath, realizing that a universe without Eddie is a reality he is completely unequipped to face.***English is not my first language, but I am trying my absolute best with this story! I really hope you guys enjoy it. Comments and kudos are always highly appreciated! <3

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I'm Not Mad. I'm Just Too Late.
entry.summary:
Author: isthatacatsherlock

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,681Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: This is a rewrite of the previous fic with the same name. Darker, more violent if possible, and more controversial probably. Mind the trigger warnings. Major violence trigger warning. There's a dead dove in here so be warned. [VANESSA]Daniela told me what you did for meAnd it’s honestly the sweetest thing anyone ever did for meNow, what can I say or do to possibly repay you for your kindness? [USNAVI]How do you get this gold shit off? [VANESSA]Usnavi! [USNAVI]Yeah! [VANESSA]Before we both leave town!Before the corner changes and the signs are taken downLet’s walk around the neighborhood and say our goodbyesUsnavi, are you alright? [USNAVI]I’m fine, I’m tryn’a open this champagneY'see the twisty thing is brokenBut I’m gonna open this damn champagne!

entry.title: so we don’t drift away
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,875Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 91

Summary: Buck loves the aquarium. Eddie loves Buck. Chris and Theo know both of those things long before Buck does. A day at the aquarium seems like a good way start to a love story. Or, the one with the sea otters.

entry.title: Shattered World: Ashes of The West
entry.summary:
Author: DylanJ10000

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 653,038Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 267

Summary: When Eddie Diaz awakens from a coma after a near-fatal shooting, he finds the world he once knew reduced to ash and chaos. A deadly virus has swept across the globe, leaving destruction in its wake and transforming humanity into something monstrous. With no sign of his son Christopher or his team, Eddie sets out into a desolate and fire-scarred Los Angeles to uncover what happened and reunite with those he loves.

entry.title: Titanium
entry.summary:
Author: Dollar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,842Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 86

Summary: The fight with Eddie opens a crack in the walls Buck has spent years unconsciously building around his past, forcing him to untangle buried memories, past relationships, and the realization that he has spent most of his life reacting, running, and reinventing himself rather than accepting who he already was. Confronting the uncomfortable truth that his feelings for Eddie and his fear of losing him, are following the same patterns that have haunted him for years.

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,357Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 295

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: What in the world?
entry.summary:
Author: Franandblueberries

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,828Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: “Apparently I’m British,” Buck said. “Yeah, I heard,” Eddie replied with amusement. Buck put his arm in front of him, stopping him in his tracks. “That’s fake me!” Buck said pointing at a trailer with a name tag that read ‘Oliver Stark’. He opened his arms. “That means this must be fake mine!” … Or Buck and Eddie end up in what seems to be a parallel universe in which they’re actors. (Inspired by Supernatural)

entry.title: What a night to forget.
entry.summary:
Author: Absolute_Maniac

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,107Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 536

Summary: “You might want to see this…” He reached over with a piece of paper in his hand. Buck took it and turned his phone over to him in return. Eddie bit into his fist as he studied the picture. Buck looked down at the paper in his hand and turned it over to the right side. It was a copy of a marriage license for Mr. Evan Buckley-Diaz and Mr. Edmundo Buckley-Diaz.orBuck and Eddie, wake up married after a night of drinking with no memory of the night before. This is the story of how they decide to deal with this drunken decision while learning a lot about themselves and each other as they go from best friends to platonic husbands and, at last, to lovers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Tides Bring The Family Together
entry.summary:
Author: Thunderbirdsfirestar

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 341Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: When abby had left the airport, she was pregnant with buck's twins. Never telling buck about the twins, buck has to wait until eddie gets shot and has to be brought to the hospital to find out.

entry.title: Ice bound
entry.summary:
Author: LovemeanywayBandE

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,328Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: 17 year old Evan Buckley and 17 year old Eddie Diaz are drafted players. Forced to play as teammates their initial dislike of each other soon grows into friendship and much more. Can they keep it secret, even from themselves. They are bound to the ice and maybe each other.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Witch's Game
entry.summary:
Author: Strawberrywaltz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,891Chapters: 5/17Kudos: 86

Summary: “You are a fake.” Eddie tips his chin up, thrilled that he found something to break her smug smile. “You and I both know it. You are a liar. You take advantage of people for financial gain. You are the worst kind of human.”“I will not tolerate such disrespect.” Aurora’s voice grows cold, along with the room. There’s a breeze that picks up, swirling around them. But—that’s all a figment of Eddie’s imagination. An illusion conjured up in his head. As is the golden glow flashing in the crow’s watchful eyes. “I will give you one last chance to take back your words.”__Or, after pissing off a witch, Eddie has to redefine his own beliefs to break a curse or risk losing Buck forever.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
